chunks.text: Problems, Directions and Issues in Memory Hierarchies (CSD-84-220) by Alan Jay Smith. Trends and Prospects in Computer System Design (CSD-84-219) by Alan Jay Smith. Measuring and Improving the Performance of 4.2BSD (CSD-84-218) by Samuel J. Leffler, Michael J. Karels and M. Kirk McKusick. A User-Process Oriented Performance Study of Ethernet Networking Under Berkeley UNIX 4.2BSD (CSD-84-217) by Luis Felipe Cabrera, Edward Hunter, Michael J. Karels and David A. Mosher. Development of a Control Process for the Berkeley UNIX Distributed Programs Monitor (CSD-84-216) by Cathryn Marcia Macrander.

CoLab, Tools for Computer-Based Cooperation: A Proposed Research Program (CSD-84-215) by Gregg Foster. Register Allocation and Data Conversion in Machine Independent Code Generators (CSD-84-214) by Marshall Kirk McKusick. Automated Discovery of Machine-Specific Code Improvements (CSD-84-213) by Peter Bernard Kessler. The Traveling Salesman Problem: The Development of a Distributed Computation (CSD-84-212) by Nick Lai and Barton P. Miller. Process Control in a Distributed Berkeley Unix Environment (CSD-84-211) by Ramon Caceres.

PLA Driver Selection: An Analytic Approach (CSD-84-210) by Fred W. Obermeier and Randy H. Katz. Considerations on the Insularity of Performance Evaluation (CSD-84-209) by Domenico Ferrari. Well-solved Special Cases of the Traveling Salesman Problem (CSD-84-208) by P. C. Gilmore, Eugene L. Lawler and D. B. Shmoys. Implementing a Cache Consistency Protocol (CSD-84-207) by Randy H. Katz, David A. Wood, Susan J. Eggers, Charles Perkins and Robert G. Sheldon. A Distributed Programs Monitor for Berkeley UNIX (CSD-84-206) by Barton P. Miller, Cathryn Macrander and Stuart Sechrest.

Geometric Continuity of Parametric Curves (CSD-84-205) by Brian A. Barsky and Anthony D. DeRose. Issues in Caching Prolog Goals (CSD-84-204) by Barry Fagin. A Prolog Compiler for the PLM (CSD-84-203) by Peter Lodewijk Van Roy. Randomized Routing in Gate-Arrays (CSD-84-202) by Prabhakar Raghavan and Clark D. Thompson. New Results in Fuzzy Clustering Based on The Concept of Indistinguishability Relation (CSD-84-201) by R. Lopez de Manteres and L. Valverde.

On the Structure of F-Indistinguishability Operators (CSD-84-200) by L. Valverde. Design and Implementation of An Integrated Snooping Data Cache (CSD-84-199) by Gaetano Borriello, Susan J. Eggers, Randy H. Katz, Harry McKinley, Charles Perkins, Walter Scott, Robert Sheldon, Shaun Whalen and David A. Wood. PHRED: A Generator for Natural Language Interfaces (CSD-84-198) by Paul S. Jacobs. Performance Characterization of Distributed Programs (CSD-84-197) by Barton Paul Miller. Circus: A Replicated Procedure Call Facility (CSD-84-196) by Eric C. Cooper.

Replicated Procedure Call (CSD-84-195) by Eric C. Cooper. Predicting Performance in UNIX Systems From Portable Workload Estimators Based on the Terminal Probe Method (CSD-84-194) by Luis Felipe Cabrera and German Rodriguez-Galant. DREAMS: Display REpresentation for Algebraic Manipulation Systems (CSD-84-193) by Gregg Foster. User Interface Considerations for Algebraic Manipulation Systems (CSD-84-192) by Gregg Foster. Tutorial Examples of Interprocess Communication in Berkeley UNIX 4.2 BSD (CSD-84-191) by Stuart Sechrest.

The Cryptographic Security of the Sum of Bits (CSD-84-190) by Richard Berger, Howard J. Karloff and David B. Shmoys. Matching Modulo Divisors, and a Simple N^1/4 Factoring Algorithm (CSD-84-187) by Eric Bach. Discrete Logarithms and Factoring (CSD-84-186) by Eric Bach. Simulation of Hierarchical Routing Algorithms (CSD-84-185) by C. V. Ramamoorthy, O. Nishiguchi and W.-T. Tsai. Graham-Glanville Code Generators (CSD-84-184) by Robert Rettig Henry.

Configuring Local Area Network-based Distributed Systems (CSD-84-183) by Tzong-yu Paul Lee. The Berkeley Internet Name Domain Server (CSD-84-182) by Douglas B. Terry, Mark Painter, David W. Riggle and Songnian Zhou. A Comparison of Tile-Based Wire Representations for Interactive IC Layout Tools (CSD-84-181) by David E. Wallace. A Decomposition Solution to a Queueing Network Model of a Distributed File System with Dynamic Locking (CSD-84-180) by Anna Hac. The APPLOG LANGUAGE: PROLOG vs. LISP -- if you can't fight them join them (CSD-84-179) by Shimon Cohen.

Multi-Version Structures in PROLOG (CSD-84-178) by Shimon Cohen. The Design and Implementation of the Berkeley Internet Name Domain (BIND) Servers (CSD-84-177) by Songnian Zhou. The Design and Implementation of a 'Domain Names' Resolver (CSD-84-176) by Mark Painter. Experimental Evaluation of On-Chip Microprocessor Cache Memories (CSD-84-175) by Mark D. Hill and Alan Jay Smith. A Name Server Database (CSD-84-174) by David W. Riggle.

Processor Design Tradeoffs in VLSI (CSD-84-173) by Robert Warren Sherburne, Jr. Hidden Feature Elimination and Visible Polygon Return in UNIGRAFIX 2 (CSD-84-172) by Paul Wensley. Finding a Maximum Density Subgraph (CSD-84-171) by A. V. Goldberg. Theoretical Issues Concerning Protection in Operating Systems (CSD-84-170) by Michael A. Harrison. Discrete Characterization of Program Referencing Dynamics (CSD-84-169) by Philippe De Smedt.
